Package.Name: Localization
Package.Summary: Exercise JSON/RESX composition, fallback, enum translation, and reload.

Result.Title: Localized values
Result.Empty: Run the sample to inspect localization behavior.

Tips.Fallback: Parent and composite fallback are explicit.
Tips.Reload: Reload retains a valid bounded snapshot.

Purpose.Title: Purpose
Purpose.Body: Use real file localizers in a Showcase-owned temporary directory.

Boundaries.Title: Boundaries
Boundaries.Temp: Files live only in a bounded safe temporary directory.
Boundaries.Dispose: Every watcher and localizer is disposed.

reload.Name: Explicit reload
reload.Description: Update the JSON resource and reload the snapshot.
